description_kn: ದೂರುದಾರರು ವರದಿ ಮಾಡಿದ ಪ್ರಕಾರ ಆರೋಪಿಯು bus stand ದಿಂದ ರೂ. 6,474 ಮೌಲ್ಯದ cash ಕದ್ದಿದ್ದಾನೆ.

description_en: Unknown persons broke forced entry and committed theft of mobile phone. Case registered u/s 457 IPC.
Gold cash stolen from house while complainant was away. Total loss estimated at Rs. 28,538.
description_kn: ಅಜ್ಞಾತ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿ(ಗಳು) the complainant's house ದಿಂದ mobile phone ಕದ್ದಿದ್ದಾರೆ. 21:00 hours ಗಂಟೆಗೆ ಕಳ್ಳತನ ಗೊತ್ತಾಯಿತು.

description_en: The accused assaulted the complainant with iron rod causing injuries near shop.
description_kn: ಆರೋಪಿಯು iron rod ಬಳಸಿ ದೂರುದಾರರ ಮೇಲೆ the complainant's house ಬಳಿ ಹಲ್ಲೆ ಮಾಡಿದ್ದಾನೆ.

description_en: The complainant was accosted by 5 accused persons who threatened with none and snatched two-wheeler.
Unknown person(s) committed theft of laptop from market area. Complainant noticed the theft at 23:00
description_kn: ಅಜ್ಞಾತ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿ(ಗಳು) bus stand ದಿಂದ gold jewellery ಕದ್ದಿದ್ದಾರೆ. 20:00 hours ಗಂಟೆಗೆ ಕಳ್ಳತನ ಗೊತ್ತಾಯಿತು.

description_en: Complainant robbed of mobile phone worth Rs. 187,940 by 3 unknown persons.
description_kn: ಅಜ್ಞಾತ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿ(ಗಳು) street ದಿಂದ cash ಕದ್ದಿದ್ದಾರೆ. 22:00 hours ಗಂಟೆಗೆ ಕಳ್ಳತನ ಗೊತ್ತಾಯಿತು.

description_en: Accused obtained Rs. 7,567,817 from complainant on false pretext of lottery.
Complainant's car bearing registration KA 04 BB 3554 was stolen from street.
description_kn: ದೂರುದಾರರ car (KA 03 AA 6527) ವಾಹನವು the complainant's house ನಿಂದ ಕಾಣೆಯಾಗಿದೆ.

description_en: Housebreaking reported. Offenders entered through tunneling and decamped with gold jewellery.
Unknown person(s) committed theft of cash from bus stand. Complainant noticed the theft at 23:00 hours.
description_kn: ಅಜ್ಞಾತ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿ(ಗಳು) market area ದಿಂದ cash ಕದ್ದಿದ್ದಾರೆ. 19:00 hours ಗಂಟೆಗೆ ಕಳ್ಳತನ ಗೊತ್ತಾಯಿತು.

description_en: Gold two-wheeler stolen from house while complainant was away. Total loss estimated at Rs. 3,808.
The complainant reported that the accused stole cash valued at Rs. 626 from market area on the above date.
The accused broke into the complainant's house by fake delivery and stole gold jewellery worth Rs. 2
description_kn: ಆರೋಪಿಯು fake delivery ಮೂಲಕ ದೂರುದಾರರ ಮನೆಗೆ ನುಗ್ಗಿ ರೂ. 220,432 ಮೌಲ್ಯದ two-wheeler ಕದ್ದಿದ್ದಾನೆ.

description_en: Complainant was attacked by 3 persons. Injuries sustained. Admitted to hospital.
